message:
Add XML parsing functions

Introduce two TQL functions for parsing XML data:

- `parse_xml`: Generic XML parser with XPath selection, configurable
  attribute prefixes, namespace handling, and depth limiting
- `parse_winlog`: Windows Event Log XML parser with special handling
  for EventData sections

Uses libexpat for efficient streaming XML parsing.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+---
+title: XML parsing functions for TQL
+type: feature
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2025-12-30T17:54:38.825139Z
+---
+
+The new `parse_xml` and `parse_winlog` functions parse XML strings into structured records, enabling analysis of XML-formatted logs and data sources.
+
+The `parse_xml` function offers flexible XML parsing with XPath-based element selection, configurable attribute handling, namespace management, and depth limiting. It supports multiple match results as lists and handles both simple and complex XML structures.
+
+The `parse_winlog` function specializes in parsing Windows Event Log XML format, automatically finding Event elements and transforming EventData/UserData sections into properly structured fields.
+
+Both functions integrate with Tenzir's multi-series builder for schema inference and type handling.

@@ -130,6 +130,12 @@ provide_find_module(libmaxminddb)
 find_package(c-ares REQUIRED)
 provide_find_module(c-ares)
 
+# -- expat (XML parsing) -------------------------------------------------------
+
+find_package(EXPAT REQUIRED)
+string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(EXPAT REQUIRED)")
+dependency_summary("expat" EXPAT::EXPAT "Dependencies")
+
 # -- jemalloc ------------------------------------------------------------------
 
 set(TENZIR_ALLOCATOR_NEEDS_JEMALLOC OFF)
@@ -291,6 +297,9 @@ target_link_libraries(libtenzir_builtins PRIVATE c-ares::cares)
 string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(c-ares REQUIRED)")
 dependency_summary("c-ares" c-ares::cares "Dependencies")
 
+# Link against expat.
+target_link_libraries(libtenzir_builtins PRIVATE EXPAT::EXPAT)
+
 # Link against jemalloc.
 if (TENZIR_ALLOCATOR_NEEDS_JEMALLOC)
   target_link_libraries(libtenzir PUBLIC jemalloc::jemalloc_)

@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+// Full Windows Security event
+from {
+       x: r#"<Event xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event">
+  <System>
+    <Provider Name="Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing" Guid="{54849625-5478-4994-A5BA-3E3B0328C30D}"/>
+    <EventID>4624</EventID>
+    <Version>2</Version>
+    <Level>0</Level>
+    <Task>12544</Task>
+    <Opcode>0</Opcode>
+    <Keywords>0x8020000000000000</Keywords>
+    <TimeCreated SystemTime="2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z"/>
+    <EventRecordID>12345</EventRecordID>
+    <Execution ProcessID="500" ThreadID="520"/>
+    <Channel>Security</Channel>
+    <Computer>WORKSTATION1</Computer>
+    <Security/>
+  </System>
+  <EventData>
+    <Data Name="SubjectUserSid">S-1-5-18</Data>
+    <Data Name="SubjectUserName">SYSTEM</Data>
+    <Data Name="LogonType">3</Data>
+  </EventData>
+</Event>"#
+     },
+     // Minimal event
+     {
+       x: r#"<Event xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event">
+  <System>
+    <Provider Name="Application"/>
+    <EventID>1000</EventID>
+    <Channel>Application</Channel>
+    <Computer>SERVER1</Computer>
+  </System>
+</Event>"#
+     },
+     // Event with unnamed Data elements (positional)
+     {
+       x: r#"<Event xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event">
+  <System>
+    <Provider Name="Application"/>
+    <EventID>1001</EventID>
+    <Channel>Application</Channel>
+    <Computer>SERVER1</Computer>
+  </System>
+  <EventData>
+    <Data>MyApp.exe</Data>
+    <Data>1.0.0.0</Data>
+  </EventData>
+</Event>"#
+     },
+     // Malformed XML
+     {x: "<Event><System>"}
+y = x.parse_winlog()

@@ -0,0 +1,70 @@
+{
+  x: "<Event xmlns=\"http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event\">\n  <System>\n    <Provider Name=\"Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing\" Guid=\"{54849625-5478-4994-A5BA-3E3B0328C30D}\"/>\n    <EventID>4624</EventID>\n    <Version>2</Version>\n    <Level>0</Level>\n    <Task>12544</Task>\n    <Opcode>0</Opcode>\n    <Keywords>0x8020000000000000</Keywords>\n    <TimeCreated SystemTime=\"2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z\"/>\n    <EventRecordID>12345</EventRecordID>\n    <Execution ProcessID=\"500\" ThreadID=\"520\"/>\n    <Channel>Security</Channel>\n    <Computer>WORKSTATION1</Computer>\n    <Security/>\n  </System>\n  <EventData>\n    <Data Name=\"SubjectUserSid\">S-1-5-18</Data>\n    <Data Name=\"SubjectUserName\">SYSTEM</Data>\n    <Data Name=\"LogonType\">3</Data>\n  </EventData>\n</Event>",
+  y: {
+    System: {
+      Channel: "Security",
+      Computer: "WORKSTATION1",
+      EventID: "4624",
+      EventRecordID: "12345",
+      Execution: {
+        ProcessID: "500",
+        ThreadID: "520",
+      },
+      Keywords: "0x8020000000000000",
+      Level: "0",
+      Opcode: "0",
+      Provider: {
+        Name: "Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing",
+        Guid: "{54849625-5478-4994-A5BA-3E3B0328C30D}",
+      },
+      Security: null,
+      Task: "12544",
+      TimeCreated: {
+        SystemTime: "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z",
+      },
+      Version: "2",
+    },
+    EventData: {
+      SubjectUserSid: "S-1-5-18",
+      SubjectUserName: "SYSTEM",
+      LogonType: "3",
+    },
+  },
+}
+{
+  x: "<Event xmlns=\"http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event\">\n  <System>\n    <Provider Name=\"Application\"/>\n    <EventID>1000</EventID>\n    <Channel>Application</Channel>\n    <Computer>SERVER1</Computer>\n  </System>\n</Event>",
+  y: {
+    System: {
+      Channel: "Application",
+      Computer: "SERVER1",
+      EventID: "1000",
+      Provider: {
+        Name: "Application",
+      },
+    },
+  },
+}
+{
+  x: "<Event xmlns=\"http://schemas.microsoft.com/win/2004/08/events/event\">\n  <System>\n    <Provider Name=\"Application\"/>\n    <EventID>1001</EventID>\n    <Channel>Application</Channel>\n    <Computer>SERVER1</Computer>\n  </System>\n  <EventData>\n    <Data>MyApp.exe</Data>\n    <Data>1.0.0.0</Data>\n  </EventData>\n</Event>",
+  y: {
+    System: {
+      Channel: "Application",
+      Computer: "SERVER1",
+      EventID: "1001",
+      Provider: {
+        Name: "Application",
+      },
+    },
+    EventData: {},
+  },
+}
+{
+  x: "<Event><System>",
+  y: null,
+}
+warning: failed to parse Windows Event XML
+  --> tests/functions/parse/parse_winlog.tql:54:5
+   |
+54 | y = x.parse_winlog()
+   |     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 
+   |

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+// Simple element extraction
+from {x: "<root><item>hello</item></root>"},
+     // Multiple elements -> list
+     {x: "<items><item>A</item><item>B</item><item>C</item></items>"},
+     // Attributes with @ prefix
+     {x: r#"<book id="1" lang="en">Title</book>"#},
+     // Nested elements
+     {x: "<catalog><book><title>XML</title><author>Jane</author></book></catalog>"},
+     // Empty element
+     {x: "<empty/>"},
+     // Malformed XML
+     {x: "<not-closed"}
+y = x.parse_xml(xpath="/*")

@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@
+{
+  x: "<root><item>hello</item></root>",
+  y: [
+    {
+      item: "hello",
+    },
+  ],
+}
+{
+  x: "<items><item>A</item><item>B</item><item>C</item></items>",
+  y: [
+    {
+      item: [
+        "A",
+        "B",
+        "C",
+      ],
+    },
+  ],
+}
+{
+  x: "<book id=\"1\" lang=\"en\">Title</book>",
+  y: [
+    {
+      "@id": "1",
+      "@lang": "en",
+      "#text": "Title",
+    },
+  ],
+}
+{
+  x: "<catalog><book><title>XML</title><author>Jane</author></book></catalog>",
+  y: [
+    {
+      book: {
+        author: "Jane",
+        title: "XML",
+      },
+    },
+  ],
+}
+{
+  x: "<empty/>",
+  y: [
+    {},
+  ],
+}
+{
+  x: "<not-closed",
+  y: null,
+}
+warning: failed to parse XML
+  --> tests/functions/parse/parse_xml.tql:13:5
+   |
+13 | y = x.parse_xml(xpath="/*")
+   |     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 
+   |

@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+// Test custom attr_prefix (empty removes @ prefix)
+from {x: r#"<item id="1">value</item>"#}
+y = x.parse_xml(xpath="/*", attr_prefix="")

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+// Test namespace handling: strip (default) vs keep
+from {x: r#"<ns:root xmlns:ns="http://example.com"><ns:item>A</ns:item></ns:root>"#},
+     {x: r#"<ns:root xmlns:ns="http://example.com"><ns:item>B</ns:item></ns:root>"#}
+y = x.parse_xml(xpath="/*", namespaces="strip")
+z = x.parse_xml(xpath="/*", namespaces="keep")

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+{
+  x: "<ns:root xmlns:ns=\"http://example.com\"><ns:item>A</ns:item></ns:root>",
+  y: [
+    {
+      item: "A",
+    },
+  ],
+  z: [
+    {
+      "@xmlns:ns": "http://example.com",
+      "ns:item": "A",
+    },
+  ],
+}
+{
+  x: "<ns:root xmlns:ns=\"http://example.com\"><ns:item>B</ns:item></ns:root>",
+  y: [
+    {
+      item: "B",
+    },
+  ],
+  z: [
+    {
+      "@xmlns:ns": "http://example.com",
+      "ns:item": "B",
+    },
+  ],
+}
